violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Open bag of nacho cheese in refrigerator and container of scrambled eggs in kitchen refrigerator are not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Minimal crumbs under cutting board. -Residue/frosting at sprinkle container and lid. (COS) -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans. -Minimal splatter at edge of storage bin for clean dishes. -Splatter at upper interior of microwave. -Crumbs at interior bottom of freezer of combo fridge.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -Dishes were dipped in sanitizer but were not left in sanitizer solution for the minimum 60 second contact time.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Used butter knife was in kitchen hand sink basin.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustic ceiling tiles throughout kitchen, dish pit and front make line. -Missing floor tiles/unsealed cement below 3 comp sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Some water damage at a few ceiling tiles throughout kitchen.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep -them clean. -Walk in freezer has debris at floor. -Walk in cooler has some debris at build up under shelving and at edges. -Debris/dust at plumbing and floor below 3 comp sink.
